emails.subject: Liquids agreements
emails.body: Liquids agreements Eric, can you have someone fax to me a copy of the TCPL Cochrane shrink agreement and also the PC empress shrink agreement. SPPC has asked me to help her figure out the deal she has and I need to refresh on paper issues. Don't know if there is a deal here or not? Thanks, BT

emails.subject: RE: Liquids agreements
emails.body: RE: Liquids agreements We have faxed these. Hope they help. To: Le Dain, Eric

emails.subject: RE: Liquids agreements
emails.body: I don't believe that the agreement you had sent to me for Cochrane is the latest version. I thought we executed a new agreement with tiered volumes... can you have someone re-check this and get back to me. BT To: Tycholiz, Barry
